key: Attention passengers. The blue line train to Circular Quay is now arriving on platform two. Please mind the gap. For the green line, transfer at Central Station. The next train departs in three minutes. Please keep your ticket until you reach the exit.
text: Attention passengers. The blue line train to Circular Quay is now arriving on platform two. Please mind the gap. For the green line, transfer at Central Station. The next train departs in three minutes. Please keep your ticket until you reach the exit.
